mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT P JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE JOIN PRODUCT_CATEGORY PC ON P.CATEGORY_ID = PC.CATEGORY_ID

SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID, P.CATEGORY_ID, P.COMPANY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_STOCK, P.PRODUCT_DETAIL, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO2, P.PRODUCT_REG_DATE, P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN, P.PET_TYPE, P.AGE_GROUP, C.COMPANY_NAME, PC.CATEGORY_NAME FROM PRODUCT P JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE JOIN PRODUCT_CATEGORY PC ON P.CATEGORY_ID = PC.CATEGORY_ID
ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_PRICE ASC, P.PRODUCT_ID DESC
ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_PRICE DESC, P.PRODUCT_ID DESC
ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_ID DESC
ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_REG_DATE DESC, P.PRODUCT_ID DESC

SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID, P.CATEGORY_ID, P.COMPANY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_STOCK, P.PRODUCT_DETAIL, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO2, P.PRODUCT_REG_DATE, P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN, P.PET_TYPE, P.AGE_GROUP, C.COMPANY_NAME, PC.CATEGORY_NAME FROM PRODUCT P JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE JOIN PRODUCT_CATEGORY PC ON P.CATEGORY_ID = PC.CATEGORY_ID WHERE P.PRODUCT_ID = #{value} AND P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMPANY ( COMPANY_CODE, COMPANY_NAME, STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_COMPANY.NEXTVAL, #{value}, 'Y' )
